name: ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN
description: Platform administrator — manages users, roles, menus, CMS, workflows, regions. No channel data access.

name: ROLE_ADMIN
description: Highest business authority — full operational access, all regions, override approval chains.

name: ROLE_MANAGER
description: Geographically scoped business approver — authority determined by assigned region.

name: ROLE_INTERNAL_EMPLOYEE
description: Internal company employee — operations, sales, finance, product team.

name: ROLE_EXTERNAL_EMPLOYEE
description: Contractor or outsourced user with limited operational access.

name: ROLE_DISTRIBUTOR
description: Distributor partner — scoped to own company. Uploads sales, manages inventory.

name: ROLE_CHANNEL_PARTNER
description: Channel partner — scoped to own company. Customer sales, activations.

name: ROLE_GUEST
description: Default registration role — minimal dashboard access.
